system.description: As a Half Action, the Tyranid psyker may let forth a terrible silent scream that echoes in the mind as a crippling shriek. All sentient, living creatures (not soulless machines or daemons) within 20 metres suffer a hit that deals 1d10+8 Impact Damage to their head with the Shocking quality (see Weapon Special Qualities on page 142 in Chapter V: Armoury). The victim suffers a -30 penalty to his Toughness Test to resist Stunning. If the Toughness Test is failed, the victim is stunned for 1d5 rounds.
